channel.title: Via on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Via on Tech Tracker

item.title: Via - Powerful Browser Under 1MB with Media Sniffer on Android For Free.
item.description: Via is one of best and powerful browser available under 1MB on Android It is considered as geeks best choice due to advanced features like media sniffer & resource sniffer and many more that are not available on most browsers out there on internet including popular browsers like chrome & mozilla except Amaze Browser **. ** Via browser work with tagline “less is more” It is perfectly apted for via browser due to the fact Via Browser packed alot of advanced features under 1mb while other browsers only provide very basic features but size of the browsers will be more then 10mb with ads everywhere but Via make hard things simple you’ll get all advanced features under 1mb with no ads which truly remarkable.

item.title: What Is Via Browser And Why You Should Use In Android - Less Is More !
item.description: ** <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-OlM64IUQRKc/XklyyRp6FOI/AAAAAAAABG0/iMx9fnW6fKASrKv9DacMh1dLFx4hfMiqACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/IMG_20200216_221907_741.jpg" alt=""> ** ** What Is Via Browser And Why You Should Use In Android - Less Is More !** Tech Tracker | The times changed now the times of html browsers to today’s android advanced browser’s that gives good competition to pc browsers in usability and features that most of the things can easily can be done in android except inspect element that android power is not enough.
